overview: This U/B/G Legacy deck leverages Aluren to reduce permanent costs to {1}, enabling rapid deployment of Show and Tell. Lotus Petal provides the necessary mana acceleration to cast these spells early and consistently. The goal is to bypass traditional mana curves by fetching high-mana-value threats for minimal investment.
win_conditions: Deploying large creatures via Show and Tell for {1} after Aluren resolves
Overwhelming opponents with early mana advantage from Lotus Petal
Generating unblockable combat damage with fetched threats

keep_criteria: Hands containing Lotus Petal or Aluren
Hands with Show and Tell and at least two lands
Hands with early mana acceleration and draw
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking lands or mana sources
Hands with only high-cost permanents and no Aluren
Hands with no interaction or combo pieces

early_game: Prioritize playing Lotus Petal and Aluren to establish cost reduction and mana generation
Use Show and Tell for {1} to fetch a large threat as soon as possible
Protect key permanents from early disruption
mid_game: Apply consistent pressure with fetched creatures
Use excess mana to cast additional spells or fetch more threats
Maintain board presence while searching for answers to opponent's threats
late_game: Leverage mana advantage to outvalue opponents
Use Show and Tell repeatedly to fetch game-ending permanents
Stabilize against control decks by reducing removal costs to {1}

key_cards.name: Aluren
key_cards.notes: Sets all permanent mana costs to {1}, enabling early Show and Tell and cheap removal or interaction.

key_cards.name: Lotus Petal
key_cards.notes: Provides early mana to cast Show and Tell or pay for Aluren's synergy, often played before Aluren to generate resources.

key_cards.name: Show and Tell
key_cards.notes: Fetches permanents with mana value 7 or greater; cast for {1} after Aluren resolves to bypass traditional mana curves.

sequencing_tips: Play Lotus Petal before Aluren to generate mana for Show and Tell
Cast Aluren before Show and Tell to reduce its cost to {1}
Use Show and Tell to fetch threats with mana value 7 or greater
Prioritize fetching creatures that can immediately impact the board

matchups.advice: Use Aluren to reduce blocker or removal costs to {1}, and fetch large creatures to stabilize quickly.
Protect combo pieces with counterspells or evasion, and use Show and Tell to fetch threats that pressure life totals.
Disrupt their key pieces early, and race them by deploying large threats via Show and Tell as fast as possible.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Aluren reduces costs to {1}, Lotus Petal accelerates mana, Show and Tell fetches MV 7+ permanents.

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Signature card synergy enables early big threats.

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Aluren reduces costs to {1}, Lotus Petal accelerates mana, Show and Tell fetches MV 7+ permanents.

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: Standard Legacy interaction and removal spells.
